text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I want to win the Yasuda Kinen no matter what,
so I can give Zephyr courage!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I don't know if it'll be enough to help her. But I do know how good it feels to have someone on your side.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It's so cool that Zephyr is doing her best for
someone else's sake, and I want to support her,
even if cheering her on is all I can do.
